title: luzula campestris var. congesta
intro: Luzula campestris var. congesta, also known as congested woodrush, is a variety of the woodrush plant that belongs to the sedge family (Juncaceae). Traditionally, congested woodrush has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, to treat various health issues. The plant is rich in compounds that have been known to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, offering several health benefits. In herbal preparations, congested woodrush is often used in infusions, teas, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
